subcodes.first_line: O Tahir! Verily thy Lord hath sent down from the clouds of His bountiful grace a pure and purifying water, and a praiseworthy abundance; purify thyself therewith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طاهر ان ربک قد نزل من غمام فیض رحمته ماء طهورا و فیضا مشکورا و طهر به
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
